article_meta.title: A California judge scolded members of Mark Zuckerberg's legal team after they showed up to a Los Angeles courtroom weari

reasoning: The model violated attribution by flagging a quoted source phrase, used non-approved bias type labels, and missed several clear instances of author-level bias (e.g., 'scolded,' 'high-stakes,' 'closely watched'). One flagged item was valid author prose but mislabeled.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged 'an extraordinary misstep' which is inside quotes and attributed to Jacob Ward.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Half of the flagged items are incorrect due to attribution error; the other is defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple clear author-prose biases: 'scolded' (word choice), 'high-stakes' (subjective qualifier), 'closely watched' (subjective qualifier), possibly 'raising concerns...'.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed labels ('Loaded Language', 'Framing'); even the valid author-prose item was mislabeled outside the allowed set.
